items.name: MisakaNet
items.description: 📚 A zero-dependency, git-backed micro-lesson library for AI Agents to asynchronously share and search verified debugging experience. Python stdlib only. | https://misakanet.org

items.name: agent-threat-rules
items.description: Open detection standard -- like Sigma, but for AI agents. 425 rules, shipped in Microsoft AGT, Cisco AI Defense, MISP, OWASP A-S-R-H. 97.1% recall on NVIDIA garak. NIST OSCAL Path 1.

items.name: omnigent
items.description: A meta-harness for all your AI agents.  Omnigent provides a common layer over Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and the agents you write yourself: swap or combine harnesses without rewriting, keep them in check with policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time on the same live session, from any device.

items.name: takt
items.description: TAKT Agent Koordination Topology - Define how AI agents coordinate, where humans intervene, and what gets recorded — in YAML

items.name: KKTerm
items.description: Windows-first AI-agent super-tool for vibe coders & system admins — terminals, SSH, SFTP, RDP/VNC, dashboards, install helpers, and a built-in AI assistant.

items.name: opc
items.description: OPC — One Person Company. A full team in a single Claude Code skill. Adaptive agent orchestrator with 11 built-in roles, 4 modes, and adversarial quality control.

items.name: cherry-studio
items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs
